jdk.incubator.vector/Vector/reinterpretS.name: reinterpretShape
signatures: public abstract<F> Vector<F> reinterpretShape(VectorSpecies<F> species, int part)

description.en: Transforms this vector to a vector of the given species of element typeF, reinterpreting the bytes of this vector without performing any value conversions.

info.excerpt: Transforms this vector to a vector of the given species of element typeF, reinterpreting the bytes of this vector without performing any value conversions.
